permits.description: We are completing a 30% renovation of this home, focusing on the entire first floor and two second-floor bathrooms. The scope includes bringing all MEP systems up to code, installing a new furnace, and making siding repairs. Exterior work also involves a full roof replacement and the construction of a new rear deck Please refer to the new contract and plans as they have changed the scope of work.
permits.score_reasons: high cost ($1,000,000); keyword: renovation; minor: furnace

llm_assessment.reasoning: A massive $1,000,000 renovation of the entire first floor and multiple bathrooms following a very recent purchase strongly suggests a high-end flip or major value-add project intended for resale.
